message:
🐛 Fix agentFetch test mocks to intercept via global.fetch (#10423)

PR #10398 migrated kc-agent fetch calls from raw fetch() to agentFetch()
wrapper. Tests mock global.fetch directly, but those mocks no longer
intercept agentFetch calls, causing 382 test failures.

This fix adds a module-level mock for agentFetch in the test setup that
delegates to global.fetch, allowing test mocks to intercept both direct
fetch() calls and agentFetch() wrapper calls transparently.

Fixes #10400 #10401

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
